title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Reports Resolved
body:
The following moderation actions have been taken:

✅ Banned: spam_wave_42 - Phishing activity across 6 channels
✅ Banned: toxic_runner - Targeted harassment against community newcomers
✅ Closed (false positive): core_maintainer - Brigading attack dismissed, trusted member cleared

Reports processed: 3 high-severity cases
Actions: 2 bans, 1 dismissal

The moderation queue is now clear of high-priority items.
